title: Sneaky warning: missing numbered clause '(1)' (flash-glare, level 2, tilt-right)
image_prompt: Photorealistic dark glass bottle with a riveted metal style label. Verbatim text to include exactly: 'Ironclad', 'Rye Whiskey', '45% Alc./Vol.', '750 mL', 'Distilled and bottled by Ironclad Spirits, Baltimore, MD'. Include a separate paragraph in small print: 'GOVERNMENT WARNING: According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.'
visualObservation: Readable photo: small highlight outside critical label text. Camera orientation is tilt-right (15 degrees).
